#PocketWatch #VintageWatches #WatchCollector #DubaiShopping #MainspringDXB

Before buying a second-hand watch, ensure your watch's reference number matches with your watch, and secondly ensure your movement has been used by the manufacturer for your reference number. These two checks are not enough but are the main points of a verification..

At Mainspring, we make all the required and detailed inspections before we buy a watch to display in our store and present to our customers. 
We issue a store authenticity liability certificate with each watch we sell and also provide 3 months warranty.
Shop in confidence, buy authentic.
www.mainspringsubai.com 

Visit our store @theb1mall everyday
Meet us @dubaifleamarket everyweekend

#watch #authentic #vintagewatch #swisswatch#dubaiwatches

The iconic Tank-shaped case remains one of the most sought-after watch designs ever created. Its clean lines, timeless proportions, and elegant presence have inspired countless brands over the decades.

In this carousel, we’ve gathered some of our favorite “Eco-Tankish” pieces—beautiful rectangular watches that capture the classic Tank aesthetic without the Cartier price tag. Whether you’re starting your collection or simply love vintage design, these are proof that great style doesn’t have to break the bank.

💬 Which one would you wear?

📍 Visit us at Mainspring Dubai, B1 Mall
✅ 100% Authentic
🛡️ 3-Month Warranty
✨ Peace of Mind, Officially Guaranteed

www.mainspringdubai.com

#VintageWatches #TankStyle #WatchCollector #AffordableLuxury #MainspringDubai
